input: Hello, my name is Maya Patel. I work at Northwell Health and make $4,800 per month. It would just be me and one small dog. I want to move in on June 28, 2026. Email: maya.patel@example.com. Phone: 917-555-0184.

This is Jordan Lee. My partner and I are interested in the 2-bedroom listing. I am employed by Metro Design and together we make $9,400/month. We'd like to start the lease on August 1, 2026. Email jordanl@email.com. No pets. My father can be our guarantor.
Hi, I'm Sofia Ramos, a graduate student relocating in early September. I don't have full-time income yet, so my aunt would co-sign. Please email me at sofia.ramos@uni.edu.
My name is Devin Brooks. I'm self-employed and usually bring in around $5.2k a month before tax. Just me. Planning to move in mid-July. No pets, no guarantor. Reach me at 646-555-0172.

Hi leasing team, Ana and Chris here. We both work remotely; I am with Brightline and Chris is with a startup. Combined income is about $11,000 monthly. We'd need parking and have one cat. Looking to move sometime near the end of June. Contact: ana.chris.househunt@gmail.com.
I am Lewis Chen. Currently employed by Harbor Labs. Salary is $6,100 per month. Lease start September 3, 2026. No pets. Phone 212-555-0101 and email lewisc@harborlabs.com.

Hello, I'm Rachel Kim. I accepted a new role with Beacon Media and expect to earn about 58k annually. I would move from Chicago around July 10. It's only me. I do have a 20-pound rescue dog. Email rachel.kim88@mail.com.
This is Omar Haddad. My roommate and I are looking for a September move-in. We have no pets. My monthly income is $3,900 and his is similar. Call me at 718-555-0198.

Good afternoon. My name is Priya Shah and I freelance full time. I usually invoice between $4,000 and $6,000 each month depending on the season. Hoping to move in late May. No pets. I can provide a guarantor if absolutely required. priya.shah@email.com

expected.guarantor: can provide a guarantor if required

input: Hi, this is Elena Ortiz. I work at Boston Children's Hospital. I make $7,250 monthly and want to move in on October 1. My sister may stay with me occasionally, but I would be the only tenant. No pets. Phone is (617) 555-0142.

Hello, we are Malik Johnson and Theo Price. Theo is starting at City Transit next month and I work at a law office. Our total income should be around $8,800/month. We have two cats and need to move as soon as possible, ideally by June 15. Email malik.theo.apts@pm.me and phone 347-555-0125.
This is Nia Walker. Employed by Green Point Dental. Monthly income $5,400. I have no pets and no guarantor. Just me. Move in date would be November 2, 2026. Contact niaw@greenmail.com.
